speaker: Unknown
text: *On my way to the bath on the stern, I encounter someone I’ve never seen before.*

speaker: Baten
text: Oh...? Well, well well!!

speaker: Baten
text: Yer that Argo guy, ain'tcha? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: “Huh…!? Y-Yes… I am.”

speaker: Argo
text: You know about me?

speaker: Baten
text: I heard about you from Scheat and Derich, but I could tell just by lookin’ at yer face!

speaker: Baten
text: You definitely got a certain air about ya… It’s no surprise you got the recommendation. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: (Is it that obvious...?)

speaker: Baten
text:
Oops, where are my manners! I am the great Baten!
The dragon who commands Ludvigo!

speaker: Argosigh*…*
text: Lord Baten...

speaker: Baten
text: Don’t be afraid to ask ya got any questions! I won't bite! *

speaker: Argo
text: S-Sure.

speaker: Argo
text: (He’s not like Lord Scheat at all…) *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: I’m on my way to see the bath.

speaker: Baten
text: Oh, did Derich ya about it? If you wanna see it, you should go at night.*

speaker: Argo
text: Why?

speaker: Baten
text: It ain’t ready yet! You’ll be able to jump right in once it’s dark. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: I see... Then I'll check it out tonight. *

speaker: Baten
text: Yer gonna love it. I designed this ship after all! And I’m all about that bath! *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Y-You did?

speaker: Baten
text: You know it! I’m a shipbuildin' genius! *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: That’s not all I’m good at! I’m a licensed diver, navigator, customs broker, international logistics manager, hazardous materials handler…

speaker: Argo
text: Y—You do all that?

speaker: Baten
text: That’s right! Livin' life without usin' yer brain would be totally boring!

speaker: Baten
text: Doin' business with mortals is fun 'cause ya gotta be clever! It don’t matter how physically strong you are!

speaker: Baten
text: Me and mortals are on even footing when it comes to trade! That makes it rewardin', ya know? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: So trade... is like fighting? *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: If we fought with our fists, I’d win with one punch. *

speaker: Argo
text: True...

speaker: Argo
text: You and Lord Scheat are complete opposites.

speaker: Baten
text: What?! Don’t compare me to that shut-in! *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Sh-Shut-in...? *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text:
Why’s he gotta insist on lockin' himself up like that?
What a loser!

speaker: Baten
text: Us dragons have no reason to do that! We can do whatever we want!

speaker: Argo
text: (That’s true… I thought the same thing…)

speaker: Argo
text: Your personalities really couldn’t be more different. *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: Well, duh. It’s not like all dragons gotta act the same. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: I don’t know much about them…

speaker: Baten
text: Even though yer a Knights College student? Yer a weird one. *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: Well, just ask me about anything you don’t understand! Especially anything about the sea *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: “I’m from a fisherman’s family, so I know a bit about that myself.”

speaker: Baten
text: Oh yeahh, Derich said somethin' like that! Me and sea-raised people just get each other, ya know? That’s why I love ‘em!’

speaker: Baten
text: But you don’t know everything, right? Like what kinds of fish lurk in the deep sea? *

speaker: Argo
text: Th-The deep sea?

speaker: Baten
text: That’s right! Deeper than where a net can reach or a line can be dropped. Much, muuuch, deeper… *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: The very bottom of the sea is nothing like you’ve ever seen before, and it's just teemin' with life!

speaker: Argo
text: *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: “I’m not gonna tell you about that though.”

speaker: Argo
text: Wh-Why?

speaker: Baten
text: It wouldn’t be very fair, would it? Mortals should see the ocean floor for themselves. *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: Wouldn't the words of a great dragon like myself spoil it?

speaker: Argo
text: I guess…

speaker: Baten
text: So you agree?

speaker: Argo
text: It’s just a little frustrating to think I’ll probably never get a chance to see it in my lifetime. *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: Ah, true. You mortals have pathetically short lives. *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: Okay, then I promise I’ll teach ya all sorts of things once you kick the bucket! *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: S-Sure.

speaker: Argo
text: (I have mixed feelings about that…)

speaker: Argo
text: Um, does Ludvigo have knights too?

speaker: Baten
text: Of course we do! But they’re not quite the same as your country's.

speaker: Argo
text: Meaning...?

speaker: Baten
text: My knights are all sailors.

speaker: Argo
text: Sailors...!? All of them...!?

speaker: Baten
text: I mean, pretty much everyone lives on a boat in my country. It comes with the territory! *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: “Ya can’t call yerself a knight if ya can’t even hoist a sail! That’s our motto.”

speaker: Argo
text: So people who can’t swim wouldn’t have a chance, right? *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: Hell no! They’d be kicked out!

speaker: Argo
text: (I can’t tell if he’s joking or serious…)

speaker: Baten
text: By that line of reasonin', maybe yer more suited for us than Frontail. *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: What do ya say? Wanna try changin' nationalities once yer a knight?

speaker: Argo
text: N—No thanks, I like Frontail…

speaker: Baten
text: Ya know you’d be at sea all the time as one of my knights, right? I'd be better for you! *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: Well, think about it!

speaker: Argo
text: I—I will.

speaker: Argo
text: If you'll excuse me.

speaker: Baten
text: Later!
